title: Catalog product search and filtering
description: Extend Catalog GetAllProducts to support free-text search plus brand/type/price filters and paging via CatalogSpecParams, and expose the params through the Ocelot gateway route. Outcome: clients can search and filter the product list server-side.

title: Idempotent order creation in Ordering
description: Make Ordering's BasketCheckout consumer idempotent so a redelivered BasketCheckoutEvent/BasketCheckoutEventV2 cannot create duplicate orders (dedupe on a checkout/correlation id). Outcome: at-least-once delivery no longer produces duplicate orders.

title: Coupon validity window in Discount
description: Add ValidFrom/ValidTo columns to Discount coupons (Postgres) and enforce the active window in the GetDiscount gRPC handler so expired/not-yet-active coupons return no discount. Outcome: time-bound coupons are honored at checkout.

title: Authenticated actor on ProductActivityEvent
description: Replace the hardcoded "system" Actor in CatalogController with the authenticated user when publishing ProductActivityEvent. Outcome: Ordering's activity feed attributes catalog changes to the real user.

title: Order history page in account micro-frontend
description: Add an order-history view to the account remote that lists the signed-in user's orders via the Ordering GetOrdersByUserName endpoint through the gateway. Outcome: users can see their past orders in the app shell.

title: Per-route rate limiting on the API gateway
description: Tune Ocelot rate-limiting so write-heavy routes (checkout, create product) get stricter limits than read routes, with sensible 429 responses. Outcome: abusive traffic is throttled per route without harming normal browsing.

title: k6 load test for the checkout flow
description: Add a k6 scenario under tests/k6 that exercises add-to-basket then checkout (v2) end-to-end with thresholds on p95 latency and error rate. Outcome: checkout has a repeatable load test in the existing k6 suite.

title: Checkout latency dashboard and HPA
description: Add a Grafana dashboard panel for checkout p95 latency from OpenTelemetry traces and a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for Basket and Ordering in the Helm charts. Outcome: checkout latency is observable and the services scale under load.

title: add feature favorite a products
description: Add favorite feature, user can check a product to its favorite list by click an icon in single product page, and see list of favorites in its account page
summary: 4 stories: Catalog favorites API + Ocelot routes + store heart toggle + account favorites page
